name: Metro Mining Limited
analysis: MMI's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 19% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.5450, stop A$1.3860, target A$2.0220 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
